scripts.db:clean: node -r dotenv/config -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); const client = new Client({ user: process.env.DB_USER || 'postgres', host: process.env.DB_HOST || 'localhost', database: process.env.DB_NAME || 'openjob', password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD || 'postgres', port: process.env.DB_PORT || 5432 }); client.connect().then(() => client.query('TRUNCATE users, profiles, companies, categories, jobs, applications, bookmarks CASCADE')).then(() => { console.log('DATABASE HAS BEEN CLEANED!'); process.exit(0); }).catch(console.error);"
